en.value: Activity 1.1: Conduct needs assessment of selected health facilities to assess the needs and gapsActivity 1.2: Conduct market analysis/selection of suppliersActivity 1.3 Procurement of health supplies, vaccine storage equipment and hand washing stationsActivity 1.4 Conduct quality check - ensuring that the health supplies meet technical standardsActivity 1.5: Organize 8 handover events to provide COVID-19-related medical equipment and supplies, vaccine storage to the targeted public healthcare facilities/isolation centres.Activity 1.6: Design finalization and site selection for hand washing stationsActivity 1.7: Install 35 contactless hand washing stations in the 33 target public healthcare facilities.Activity 2.1: Design finalization and site selection for hand washing stationsActivity 2.2: Market Assessment and selection of suppliersActivity 2.3: Procurement of hand washing stations (this will be undertaking in conjunction with Activity 1.2)Activity 2.4: Transportation of hand washing stationsActivity 2.5: Install 28 contactless hand washing stations in identified strategic locations (market places, public transport hubs, and other public spaces).Activity 2.6: Identification of 2,000 individuals under home isolation or admitted in the isolation centreActivity 2.7: Distribute isolation kits to 2,000 covid-19 infected individuals receiving home based treatment or in Isolation Centre.Activity 2.8: Awareness-raising activities on Covid-19 prevention (radio broadcasting & IECS)Activity 3.1: Meeting with local authorities/community leaders to identify the most vulnerable HHs based on pre-defined criteriaActivity3.2: Provide orientation to volunteer/staff on beneficiary registration, revalidation process and distribution protocolsActivity 3.3: Mobilize staff/volunteers for Validation survey and Identify, and beneficiaries for distributionsActivity 3.4: Conduct market analysis/selection of suppliersActivity 3.5: Identifying and Setting up of distribution centresActivity 3.6: Transportation of relief material to distribution sitesActivity 3.7: Conduct 15 distributions to provide food packages to 3000 families (for 30 days as per government/sphere standard)Activity 3.8: Exit InterviewDetails physical targets has been mentioned below

en.full: COVID-19 Emergency Response Project in Nepal

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
